content.en:
Ye Tian picked all the 108 Star Forbidden Fruits, and prepared to use part of them for himself and part for his relatives.

However, it would take even longer for this Star Forbidden Tree to continue to give birth to the second batch of Star Forbidden Fruits, so instead of continuing to cultivate the Star Forbidden Tree here, it left here.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian called Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingyue, his wife Xiao Yue and other relatives to him.

"Father!"

"Husband!"

"Brother!"

When a few people arrived, they shouted.

"You're here!" Ye Tian said with a smile, and immediately took out the Star Forbidden Fruits.

"This is the Star Forbidden Fruit, one is enough to raise your cultivation to the extreme of the Invincible Domain Ancestor, take it for refining, you can save countless years of penance. Otherwise, with your cultivation speed, if you want to raise your cultivation to the extreme of the Invincible Domain Ancestor, I am afraid it will take an incomparably long time!"

Ye Tian said.

"Star Forbidden Fruit, and such a good thing!"

Ye Xingchen and the others were very excited.

Immediately, one of them took one Star Forbidden Fruit, and instead of taking more, one per person was enough.

Then, they began to go back to refining the Star Forbidden Fruit.

With the help of the Star Forbidden Fruit, Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingyue, Xiao Yue, and Ye Yu successively raised their cultivation to the extreme realm of the Invincible Domain Ancestor within a million years.

And their strength has also increased a lot, approaching the invincible domain ancestor combat power.

Once they have some success in controlling the extreme of their physical bodies, they will definitely have one step of invincible domain ancestor combat power.

And Ye Tian is also refining the Star Forbidden Fruit, although the Star Forbidden Fruit is not very helpful to him, but he can't hold up the amount!

More than 100 Star Forbidden Fruits were enough for him to advance by three percent from the middle stage of the Peerless Domain Ancestor to the late stage of the Peerless Domain Ancestor.

Ye Tian's speed of refining the Star Forbidden Fruit was much faster than Ye Xingchen's, and he could refine a Star Forbidden Fruit in almost 10,000 years.

Therefore, now that millions of years have passed, Ye Tian has refined all the 100 Star Forbidden Fruits, and only the last four Star Forbidden Fruits are left, which will be left to the geniuses of the human race in the future.

What Ye Tian didn't know was that in the Dark Forbidden Realm Boundary Space, the Six Ancestors were starting a very important meeting.

-------------------

In a great hall of nothingness, the six ancestors were here.

Of these six ancestors, two were from the Dark Sanctuary, three were from the Dark Destruction Domain, and one was the Supreme Sect Master somewhere in the Dark Forbidden Domain.

The six great ancestors are not ordinary ancestors, but the top ancestors above the ordinary ancestors, and their strength is comparable to that of the Eight Patterns Silent Annihilation Clan.

"Ladies and gentlemen, it's time again, the third Dark Sanctuary is coming again, we've been delaying this border for too long!"

The person who spoke was the space-time ancestor of the Dark Destruction Domain, and the one who built the space-time gate, and his strength was incomparably powerful, far above the ordinary ancestors.

"Yes, the third Dark Holy Land is much more valuable than here!"

The person who spoke was the Realm Ancestor, and the Realm Lord was one of the ancestors of the Battle Gate.

Others think that there is only one ancestor in the Battle Gate, but in fact there are two ancestors, one is the War Ancestor and the other is the Realm Ancestor, and the War Realm Tower is actually a sacred relic of the Realm Ancestor.

The strength of the War Ancestor is only comparable to the top of the Seven Patterns of Silence Annihilation, and the Realm Ancestor is the second ancestor of the Battle Gate, but its strength surpasses that of the War Ancestor and reaches the combat power of the Eight Lines of the Silence Clan, second only to the first ancestor of the Dark Sacred Domain, the Holy Ancestor.

The strength of the Holy Ancestor was actually comparable to that of the Nine Patterns Silent Annihilation Clan, and it was much stronger than the Ancestor of Time and Space.

One-on-one, if the Ancestor of Time and Space does not run, it may even be killed by the Holy Ancestor.

Of course, the Dark Sanctuary is also comparable to the ancestor of the Nine Stripes Silent Annihilation Clan, that is, the Destruction Ancestor of the Dark Destruction Domain, which can be called the source of endless destruction.

The Destruction Saint Ancestor, one of the three top ancestors, and there are even a lot of ordinary ancestors, so the strength of the Dark Sacred Domain is actually slightly inferior.

Of course.

The potential of the Dark Sanctuary is very high, if it weren't for the fact that the Dark Sanctuary was born too late, otherwise it wouldn't be as good as the Dark Destruction Domain.

There are currently two Dark Holy Lands in the Dark Forbidden Domain, the first is the Dark Destruction Domain, and the second is the Dark Sacred Domain, but this is something that many cultivators don't know, and they still think that the Dark Destruction Domain was born later.

However, the birth of a Dark Sanctuary will have a protection period, during which the ancestors will not be able to enter the Dark Sanctuary, otherwise the Dark Sanctuary would have been destroyed or occupied by the Dark Destruction Domain long ago.

If Ye Tian knew the true strength of these ancestors, he would be very puzzled, they had two ancestors comparable to the Nine Patterns Silent Annihilation Clan, but the Silent Annihilation Clan only had one, why they had not broken through the Silent Annihilation Clan, they could only resist it.

There is only one reason, the treasure of silence!

Once the Silent Destruction Clan is defeated, then this special time and space will no longer exist, and it will be difficult to continue to give birth to the Silent Destruction Treasure.

And the treasure of annihilation is valuable to them, and it is very safe to sit here, and they can cut leeks again and again.

This is the reason why the Silent Extinction Race has always existed and has not been wiped out.

As for the occasional fallout of a peerless domain ancestor, it is nothing to them, so what is the death of some peerless domain ancestors?

These forces fought each other, and there were also many fallen Superior Domain Ancestors, so this loss was nothing.

Of course.

This kind of secret can't be told to the ancestors of the Superior Domain, otherwise the impact will be relatively great.

Even, the Superior Domain Ancestor would not seriously resist the Silent Annihilation Clan, so just relying on these Ancestors, they couldn't stop all of them, once they escaped some, it would really be a big problem.

After all, these Silent Annihilation Clans are also growing very fast, and if they are given enough resources and territory, they can really give birth to several Nine-Pattern Silent Annihilation Clans.

So, it's not a scene they want to see.

But now it's different, the third Dark Sanctuary is about to be born, this is the rule of the Dark Forbidden Realm, and it is also calculated by the ancestors.

As for where the third Dark Sanctuary would appear, they couldn't figure it out, so they could only wait silently.

But one thing is very clear, once the third Dark Holy Land is born, the Superior Domain Ancestor cannot stay here, and must contribute to the fight for the third Dark Holy Land.

At that time, these forces will not be able to continue to cooperate.

Therefore, they must defeat the Silent Annihilation Clan and destroy this place, and they can't stay any longer, otherwise the power will be held back, and there will be no way to do many things.
